title: Date Stuffed Tagine Chicken
description: A rich and flavorful North African-inspired dish featuring tender chicken stuffed with sweet dates, served over a bed of fluffy rice.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together garam masala, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Stuff each chicken breast with pitted dates.
Rub the chicken with the spice mixture.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken until browned on both sides.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the rice according to package instructions.
To serve, place a portion of rice on a plate, then top with a piece of chicken.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a simple green salad.
